title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 With Major Reasoning Improvements
description: OpenAI has announced GPT-5, featuring significant advances in multi-step reasoning, code generation, and factual accuracy. The model is available via API and ChatGPT Pro.

title: Bitcoin Breaks $150,000 Amid Institutional Inflows
description: Bitcoin reached a new all-time high as major financial institutions increased their cryptocurrency allocations. BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF saw record inflows.

title: Federal Reserve Signals Rate Cut in July Meeting
description: The Federal Reserve indicated that a 25 basis point rate cut is likely at the July FOMC meeting, citing cooling inflation and softening labor market data.

title: EU Passes Landmark AI Regulation Framework
description: The European Union has adopted comprehensive AI regulations, setting global standards for transparency, bias testing, and high-risk AI system oversight.

title: India's GDP Growth Accelerates to 8.1% in Q1
description: India reported stronger-than-expected economic growth driven by services sector expansion and increased infrastructure spending.

title: NVIDIA Unveils Next-Gen AI Chip Architecture
description: NVIDIA announced its Blackwell Ultra architecture, promising 3x performance gains for AI training workloads. Major cloud providers have already committed to deployment.

title: Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire Negotiations Resume in Geneva
description: Diplomatic representatives from Russia and Ukraine met in Geneva for a new round of ceasefire negotiations, with mediators expressing cautious optimism.

title: WHO Declares End of Global Mpox Emergency
description: The World Health Organization officially ended the mpox public health emergency of international concern, citing effective vaccine distribution.

title: Oil Prices Drop as OPEC+ Agrees to Production Increase
description: Crude oil prices fell 4% after OPEC+ members agreed to gradually increase production quotas starting in June, aiming to stabilise global supply.

title: Climate Summit Produces Binding Carbon Reduction Targets
description: A landmark climate summit concluded with 48 nations signing binding agreements to reduce carbon emissions by 40% by 2035.

title: Apple Announces M5 Chip Lineup for Mac and iPad
description: Apple revealed its M5 chip series with on-device AI capabilities, 3nm process, and support for 128GB unified memory on Pro models.

title: Pentagon Awards $12B Contract for Autonomous Drone Fleet
description: The U.S. Department of Defense announced a $12 billion contract for development of AI-powered autonomous drone systems for reconnaissance and logistics.
